mnemonics.title: Thread Creation
mnemonics.content: THREADS: Think 'T-H-R-E-A-D-S' like 'The Horse Runs Extremely Around Downtown Safely' to remember the key points of thread creation: Thread class, Has run() method, Runnable interface, Extends Thread, Always use start(), Defines thread behavior, Synchronization.

mnemonics.title: Thread States
mnemonics.content: NEWRRRT: Think 'New Rabbit Runs Round The Track' to remember the thread states: New, Runnable, Running, Blocked, Terminated.

mnemonics.title: Thread Execution
mnemonics.content: STARTS: Think 'S-T-A-R-T-S' like 'Start The Amazing Running Thread Safely' to remember the steps of thread execution: Start the thread, Thread executes run() method, Always use start(), Run() method contains thread behavior, Thread runs concurrently, Synchronization ensures safety.
